_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Daily Resting Heart Rate is a Daily (D) record type per base-knowledge.md §3, assumed here to cover a full calendar-day interval (00:00Z-24:00Z) rather than an instant; value key `daily_resting_heart_rate.bpm`. Maps to HKQuantityTypeIdentifierRestingHeartRate (base-knowledge.md §5). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.restingHeartRatePoint().
